mapper.select: SELECT id, loan_account_id, contract_number, installment_number, due_date, principal_amount, interest_amount, total_amount, paid_principal, paid_interest, status, created_at, updated_at FROM repayment_schedule WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, loan_account_id, contract_number, installment_number, due_date, principal_amount, interest_amount, total_amount, paid_principal, paid_interest, status, created_at, updated_at FROM repayment_schedule WHERE loan_account_id = #{loanAccountId} ORDER BY installment_number ASC

SELECT id, loan_account_id, contract_number, installment_number, due_date, principal_amount, interest_amount, total_amount, paid_principal, paid_interest, status, created_at, updated_at FROM repayment_schedule WHERE contract_number = #{contractNumber} ORDER BY installment_number ASC

SELECT id, loan_account_id, contract_number, installment_number, due_date, principal_amount, interest_amount, total_amount, paid_principal, paid_interest, status, created_at, updated_at FROM repayment_schedule WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY due_date ASC

SELECT id, loan_account_id, contract_number, installment_number, due_date, principal_amount, interest_amount, total_amount, paid_principal, paid_interest, status, created_at, updated_at FROM repayment_schedule WHERE due_date < #{asOfDate} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PARTIAL', 'OVERDUE') AND (principal_amount - paid_principal) > 0 ORDER BY loan_account_id, due_date ASC

SELECT id, loan_account_id, contract_number, installment_number, due_date, principal_amount, interest_amount, total_amount, paid_principal, paid_interest, status, created_at, updated_at FROM repayment_schedule WHERE loan_account_id = #{loanAccountId} AND due_date < #{asOfDate} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'PARTIAL', 'OVERDUE') AND (principal_amount - paid_principal) > 0 ORDER BY due_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE repayment_schedule SET paid_principal = #{paidPrincipal}, paid_interest = #{paidInterest}, status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE repayment_schedule SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
